Man and Van Birmingham

Not every move requires a full removals team. Our man and van service is the perfect solution for smaller moves, single item deliveries, and budget-friendly relocations across Birmingham and the West Midlands.

  • ✓ Fully insured & vetted professional team
  • ✓ Free no-obligation quotes in minutes
  • ✓ Same-day response & flexible move dates
  • ✓ Careful handling & damage protection guarantee
📝 Get a Quote 📱 WhatsApp Us
Trustpilot
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent
Google Reviews
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5.0 Rating

Request a Quick Call Back

Sometimes you just need a reliable person with a van. Whether you are moving from a studio flat, collecting a piece of furniture, or shifting a few boxes between properties, our man and van service gives you professional help without the full removals price tag.

Our man and van service is ideal for students, single-item moves, small flat relocations, and anyone who needs a flexible and affordable moving solution. Despite the lower price point, you still get the same professionalism and careful handling that The Royals Removals is known for.

We operate across Birmingham and the wider West Midlands, covering short-distance local moves and longer trips. Our vans are fully equipped with blankets, straps, and trolleys to ensure your items are transported safely regardless of the distance.

What's Included

  • ✓ Professional driver with a fully equipped van
  • ✓ Help with loading and unloading
  • ✓ Furniture blankets and protective materials
  • ✓ Small flat and studio moves
  • ✓ Single item collections and deliveries
  • ✓ Short notice availability
  • ✓ Flexible hourly or fixed-price options
  • ✓ Coverage across Birmingham and West Midlands

Why Choose The Royals Removals?

A good man and van service should be more than just someone with a vehicle. It should be a reliable, professional service that treats your belongings with care, turns up on time, and does not charge you hidden extras halfway through the job.

The Royals Removals offers a man and van service with the same standards of professionalism as our full house removals. Our driver will help with loading and unloading, use blankets and straps to protect your items, and take care navigating stairs and tight spaces.

We offer both hourly and fixed-price options depending on the nature of the job. For small moves within Birmingham, an hourly rate is often the most cost-effective. For longer distances or larger loads, we can provide a fixed price so you know exactly what you will pay.

Fully Insured & Professionally Protected

Every move we carry out is covered by comprehensive goods-in-transit insurance (up to £50,000) and public liability insurance (up to £5 million). You are in safe hands with our insured moving company in Birmingham.

🛡️
Public Liability

Up to £5 million cover

🚛
Goods in Transit

Up to £50,000 per move

✅
Every Move Covered

No exceptions, no exclusions

🛡️ View Our Full Insurance Details

Who Is This Service For?

  • Students moving in or out of accommodation
  • Single-item moves such as sofas or appliances
  • Flat and studio apartment moves
  • Anyone needing an affordable local move
  • Last-minute or short notice moves

Areas We Cover

We provide this service across Birmingham and the wider West Midlands.

Birmingham Dudley Sandwell Walsall Wolverhampton + View All Areas

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does a man and van cost in Birmingham? +
Pricing depends on the duration and distance of your move. We offer competitive hourly rates for local jobs and fixed prices for longer distances. Contact us for a free, personalised quote.
Will the driver help with loading and unloading? +
Yes. Our man and van service includes help with loading and unloading your items. If you have particularly heavy or numerous items, we can arrange additional help.
Can I book a man and van at short notice? +
We do our best to accommodate short notice bookings subject to availability. Give us a call and we will see what we can arrange for you.
Is my stuff protected during a man and van move? +
Yes. Our vans carry furniture blankets, straps, and basic wrapping materials. Your items are secured during transit just as they would be on a full removals job.

Ready for a Royal Move?

Get your free, no-obligation quote in under 2 minutes. Fill out the quick form or call us directly. Our team responds in 10 to 15 minutes.
